evidence.claim_boundary: Explicit bundles prevent invalid automatic mass computation. They are not a measured BOM, weighing, CAD inertial-property, or material-density calibration.
evidence.replacement_contract: Replace a complete mass_properties bundle from a measured or approved profile revision; do not patch package USD or Scenario Forge.

stage_gates.summary: Source SHA-256 remained unchanged during AAN processing.
USD dependency closure produced a package-local USD tree.
AAN-04 material closure recorded source-preserved material evidence.
AAN-11 material runtime dependency closure passed.
AAN-05 recorded strict source/output physics admission evidence.

runtime_evidence.reason: AAN-06 runtime smoke requires the runtime gate, e.g. --gates static,runtime.

benchmark_contract.reason: AAN-07 benchmark contract requires the benchmark gate, e.g. --gates static,benchmark.

claims_allowed: AAN-03 static USD closure inspected the source graph and wrote an evidence manifest.
Package USD asset paths are local when the AAN-03 gate status is pass.
AAN-04 material closure recorded package-local source material evidence.
Source MDL and texture assets are preserved when listed with package hashes.
AAN-11 material runtime dependency closure passed for package-local MDL roots.
Required MDL helper modules and MDL-internal texture literals are classified with package evidence.
AAN-05 static physics and articulation evidence was recorded.
Authored rigid body, collision, mass, inertia, joint axis, and joint limits are preserved when listed with value_source=authored.
claims_forbidden: Exact Isaac Sim 4.1 binary conformance is verified without an explicit runtime environment fingerprint.
Binary USD layers with dependencies are fully supported by AAN-03 text rewriting.
Full visual material parity beyond recorded source-preservation evidence is achieved.
The immutable raw source USD was physically repaired in place.
Any sibling asset outside the declared package scope is physics-ready.
A pre-repaired overlay proves readiness of the immutable raw source family.
Measured, BOM, CAD, or real-world physical-parameter parity is verified.
Real material density was recovered from MDL appearance names or visual textures.

task_contract_report.reason: AAN-07 benchmark contract requires the benchmark gate, e.g. --gates static,benchmark.
